title: Why I Spent 20 Years Doing Internet Marketing Wrong
excerpt: Twenty years. That's how long I've been grinding at this thing called internet marketing. And I've been doing it wrong in ways I didn't even realize until now.

title: Why I Built the Forest Temple
excerpt: Forest Temple is my personal operating system. Not an app, not a brand — just the name I gave to the way I organize my life and my work when everything else felt like chaos.
